case_title: COURNALE & CO. VS. RENE PINKHAM et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINKHAM, RENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2651 44TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO $2,800.00 RENT, $2,500.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $192.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,492.80, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT (AT LENGTH); (& SEE ORDER RE BREAKDOWN OF AMOUNTS).
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PINKHAM, RENE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.
ORDER RE: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
